UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS RPS14, 14FJL LLC, AND 1463 STEVENSON LLC'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE NOTICE OF PENDENCY OF ACTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHOW REASONABLE PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON THE MERITS. PARTIES' AGREEMENT DID NOT REQUIRE SELLER'S WRITTEN ACCEPTANCE OF THE BUYER'S DISCRETIONARY RIGHT UNDER THE CONTRACT TO CANCEL THE AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,982.00, TO BE PAID BY PLAINTIFF WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE ENTRY OF ORDER. PAGES 16-27 OF PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION ARE STRICKEN. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2014 Off Calendar

Mtn To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action
Off Calendar Sep-11-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Judith J. Rentschler, Esq. of Rentschler/Tursi, (650-524-1980), for 1436 Stevenson LLC and RPS14LLC, and 14FJL LLC.
Tara J. Macomber, Esq. of Law Office of Tara J. Macomber, (415-227-9955), for Axis Development Group, LLC, Plaintiff and opposing party.
Theo F. Oliphant, Esq, Managing Partner of Axis Development Group, (415-992-6997).

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS RPS14, 14FJL LLC, and 1463 STEVENSON LLC'S Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action is GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to show reasonable probability of prevailing on the merits. Parties' agreement did not require seller's written acceptance of the buyer's discretionary right under the contract to cancel the agreement. Defendant's request for attorney's fees and costs granted in the amount of $10,982.00, to be paid by Plaintiff within 30 days of the entry of order. Pages 16-27 of Plaintiff's opposition are stricken. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
